title: Police Station Representatives Directory for Criminal Defence Firms | England & Wales

headings.text: Police Station Representatives Directory for Criminal Defence Firms in England & Wales
Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: Police Station Representatives Directory for Criminal Defence Firms in England & WalesPoliceStationRepUK is a national directory used by criminal defence firms to locate police station representatives when external cover is required.The directory supports firms across England and Wales where police station attendance is needed due to out-of-hours interviews, conflicts of interest, sickness, annual leave, or capacity issues. It provides a practical alternative to informal contact lists by allowing firms to identify available representatives by area and availability.Police station representatives listed on PoliceStationRepUK are accredited to advise and represent suspects at the police station. Representatives manage their own listings, including availability and areas covered, and can be contacted directly by firms seeking cover.The directory covers England and Wales and includes representatives covering a wide range of police areas and custody suites. Coverage and availability vary by representative and are displayed within the directory itself.This page explains the purpose and scope of the PoliceStationRepUK directory. To use the service, firms and representatives should access the relevant sections below.View the Police Station Representatives Directory →Register as a Police Station Representative →Information for Criminal Defence Firms →
